title: samba bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0:4.21.3-113]
- Rebuild for zstream
- Fix 'net ads join' in setups with multiple DCs
- Fix DC discovery after Windows netlogon hardening
  (follow-up, main fix is in samba-4.21.3-106)
- Fix winbind fork bomb in 'IPA with AD trust'
  environment
- Fix samba-gpupdate to process empty GPO Link
- Fix 'net ads kerberos kinit'
- smb.conf: Remove the '@' for NIX groups, we
  removed NIS support
full_text:
[0:4.21.3-113]
- Rebuild for zstream
- Fix 'net ads join' in setups with multiple DCs
- Fix DC discovery after Windows netlogon hardening
  (follow-up, main fix is in samba-4.21.3-106)
- Fix winbind fork bomb in 'IPA with AD trust'
  environment
- Fix samba-gpupdate to process empty GPO Link
- Fix 'net ads kerberos kinit'
- smb.conf: Remove the '@' for NIX groups, we
  removed NIS support

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-16451.html
